lessons.title: Intro to Claude & Agentic AI
lessons.description: Foundation concepts in AI agents and Claude's capabilities
objectives: Understand what agentic AI is and how it differs from traditional AI
Learn Claude's core capabilities and use cases
Explore the Claude API and documentation
Understand token pricing and API best practices
lessons.content: Claude is an AI assistant built by Anthropic. Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can autonomously plan and execute multi-step tasks. In this lesson, you'll learn the fundamentals of building with Claude, including its capabilities in reasoning, coding, analysis, and automation. We'll cover the Claude API, different model sizes (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus), and best practices for prompt engineering.

resources.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
resources.description: Best practices for writing effective prompts

keyTerms.definition: AI systems capable of autonomous planning, decision-making, and task execution
Large Language Model - neural network trained on vast amounts of text
Unit of text processing; roughly 4 characters = 1 token
Input instruction given to an AI model to generate a response

questions.text: What does agentic AI refer to?
options: AI that can plan and execute multi-step tasks autonomously
AI that only responds to direct questions
AI that works exclusively in customer service
AI that cannot make any decisions
questions.correctAnswer: AI that can plan and execute multi-step tasks autonomously

questions.text: Which Claude model is best for cost-effective simple tasks?
questions.correctAnswer: Claude Haiku

questions.text: What is a token in the context of Claude API?
options: A piece of text roughly equivalent to 4 characters
A security credential for API access
questions.correctAnswer: A piece of text roughly equivalent to 4 characters

questions.text: True or False: Claude can write, debug, and explain code
questions.correctAnswer: True

questions.text: What should you prioritize when writing prompts?
options: Making prompts as short as possible
questions.correctAnswer: Clarity and specificity of instructions

lessons.title: Prompting Fundamentals
lessons.description: Master the art of writing effective prompts
objectives: Learn the structure of effective prompts
lessons.content: Effective prompts are the foundation of working with Claude. This lesson covers the anatomy of a good prompt: clear instructions, relevant context, examples (few-shot learning), and specifying output format. You'll learn techniques like role-playing, step-by-step reasoning, and constraint setting to get the best results from Claude.

keyTerms.definition: Providing examples in the prompt to guide Claude's response
The amount of text Claude can consider at once (usually measured in tokens)
Instructions that define Claude's behavior and role

questions.text: What is few-shot learning?
options: Providing examples in your prompt to guide the response
Using Claude only for short texts
questions.correctAnswer: Providing examples in your prompt to guide the response

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a component of an effective prompt?
questions.correctAnswer: As much text as possible

questions.text: What should you do if Claude's first response isn't what you expected?
options: Ask the same question again with slightly different wording
Add more context or examples to guide the response
Change your constraints or output format specification
questions.correctAnswer: All of the above

lessons.title: Your First Automation
lessons.description: Build your first automated workflow with Claude
objectives: Make your first API call to Claude
Build a simple text processing automation
lessons.content: Time to get hands-on! You'll create your first automation using Claude's API. We'll cover authenticating with your API key, making requests with the Python SDK or REST API, parsing responses, and error handling. By the end, you'll have a working automation that processes text automatically.

resources.title: API Key Management
resources.description: How to create and manage API keys

keyTerms.definition: Secret credential used to authenticate with Claude API
Software Development Kit - library for easily calling an API
The message sent to Claude and the response received back

questions.text: Where should you store your Claude API key?
options: In environment variables, never in your code
questions.correctAnswer: In environment variables, never in your code

questions.text: What does the SDK provide?
options: An easy way to call Claude API without writing raw HTTP requests
Access to Claude without an API key
questions.correctAnswer: An easy way to call Claude API without writing raw HTTP requests

lessons.title: Building Agents
lessons.description: Create autonomous agents that make decisions
objectives: Understand agent architecture and decision loops
Implement tool use and function calling
Build agents that can call external APIs
lessons.content: Agents are AI systems that can use tools to accomplish goals. Claude can use tools (functions) to interact with external systems, fetch data, or perform actions. This lesson covers tool use, function calling, and building complete agent workflows where Claude decides what to do next based on outcomes.

resources.title: Tool Use Documentation
resources.description: How to enable Claude to use tools

keyTerms.definition: Ability for Claude to call external functions or APIs
Mechanism for Claude to request execution of specific functions
Cycle where agent decides action, executes it, evaluates outcome, repeats

questions.text: What is tool use in Claude?
options: Ability to call external functions and APIs
A way to ask Claude to think step-by-step
A method to reduce token usage
questions.correctAnswer: Ability to call external functions and APIs

questions.text: In an agent loop, what happens after Claude decides on an action?
options: The action is executed and Claude processes the result
questions.correctAnswer: The action is executed and Claude processes the result

lessons.title: Multi-Step Workflows
lessons.description: Orchestrate complex processes with multiple steps
lessons.content: Real-world automation often requires multiple steps working together. This lesson covers orchestrating complex workflows, managing state across steps, error handling, parallel execution, and monitoring. You'll learn patterns for building robust, production-ready automation systems.

keyTerms.definition: Sequence of tasks that work together to accomplish a goal
Tracking data and context as workflow progresses
Strategies for dealing with failures in workflow steps

questions.text: What is state management in a workflow?
options: Tracking data and context as steps progress
Controlling who can access the workflow
questions.correctAnswer: Tracking data and context as steps progress

lessons.title: Hands-On Capstone Project
lessons.description: Build a complete automation from start to finish
lessons.content: Bring together everything you've learned in Tier 1. You'll design and build a complete automation that demonstrates prompting, API usage, tool use, and workflow orchestration. This capstone prepares you for specialization in either Sales or Customer Service automation.

keyTerms.definition: Combining multiple systems or components into one solution

questions.text: What should your capstone project demonstrate?
options: All Tier 1 concepts: prompting, API use, tool use, and workflows
The use of one tool only
questions.correctAnswer: All Tier 1 concepts: prompting, API use, tool use, and workflows

lessons.title: APIs & Salesforce Integration
lessons.description: Connect Claude automation to Salesforce CRM
objectives: Read and write CRM data programmatically
lessons.content: Salesforce is the leading CRM platform. Learn to authenticate with Salesforce APIs, read/write contacts and deals, and create Claude-powered automations that work directly with your CRM data. We'll cover OAuth authentication, REST API calls, and building bidirectional integrations.

keyTerms.definition: Secure authentication protocol for API access
Standard web API using HTTP methods
Salesforce Object Query Language for data retrieval

questions.text: What authentication method does Salesforce recommend for API integration?
questions.correctAnswer: OAuth 2.0

lessons.title: Lead Scoring Fundamentals
lessons.description: Understand lead scoring models and implementations
lessons.content: Lead scoring determines which prospects are most likely to convert. Learn to evaluate leads based on firmographic, behavioral, and engagement data. Build Claude-powered lead scoring that automatically analyzes prospects and prioritizes high-value leads.

keyTerms.definition: Ranking leads by likelihood to convert to customers
Company characteristics like size, industry, location

questions.text: What is the goal of lead scoring?
options: To prioritize leads most likely to convert
To send the same message to all leads
questions.correctAnswer: To prioritize leads most likely to convert

lessons.title: Advanced Lead Scoring
lessons.description: Build sophisticated AI-powered lead scoring
objectives: Use Claude to analyze lead data
lessons.content: Move beyond basic lead scoring to build intelligent, AI-powered systems. Use Claude to analyze prospects in detail, considering engagement patterns, company fit, past interactions, and more. Build automated scoring that learns and adapts.

keyTerms.definition: Combining multiple data points for comprehensive evaluation

questions.text: What advantage does AI-powered lead scoring have?
options: Can process more data and find complex patterns
questions.correctAnswer: Can process more data and find complex patterns

lessons.title: Email Personalization Fundamentals
lessons.description: Create personalized email content at scale
lessons.content: Generic emails get ignored. Learn to generate personalized, relevant emails that speak to each prospect's situation. Use Claude to analyze prospect data and generate tailored messaging that increases response rates while maintaining efficiency at scale.

keyTerms.definition: Customizing content for specific individuals or segments
Comparing two versions to determine which performs better

questions.text: Why is email personalization important in sales?
options: It increases response rates and engagement
questions.correctAnswer: It increases response rates and engagement

lessons.title: Email Sequencing & Campaigns
lessons.description: Design multi-touch email campaigns
lessons.content: Single emails rarely close deals. Learn to design sophisticated email sequences that nurture relationships over time. Build automated campaigns using Claude to generate contextual follow-ups, handle objections, and adapt based on recipient behavior.

keyTerms.definition: Series of related emails sent over time to nurture a lead
System that sends emails based on triggers or schedules

questions.text: What is the advantage of email sequences over single emails?
options: They build relationships over time and increase conversion rates
They work the same as single emails
questions.correctAnswer: They build relationships over time and increase conversion rates

lessons.title: Production Systems & Monitoring
lessons.description: Deploy and monitor sales automation at scale
lessons.content: Moving from testing to production requires careful planning. Learn to build systems that are reliable, observable, and can scale. Cover error handling, logging, monitoring, and best practices for production automation that won't fail your sales team.

keyTerms.definition: Live system used by real users/customers
Continuously observing system health and performance
Recording events and errors for debugging

questions.text: Why is monitoring important in production automation?
options: To quickly detect and fix issues before they impact users
questions.correctAnswer: To quickly detect and fix issues before they impact users

lessons.title: Sales Data Analysis with Claude
lessons.description: Use Claude to extract insights from sales data
lessons.content: Claude can analyze complex sales data and generate meaningful insights. Learn to feed sales data to Claude for analysis: which campaigns work best, which customer segments convert highest, what objections appear most, and recommendations for improvement.

keyTerms.definition: Examining data to find patterns and insights
Quantifiable measurements of performance

questions.text: What can Claude help with regarding sales data?
questions.correctAnswer: Analyzing patterns and generating insights

lessons.title: Objection Handling Automation
lessons.description: Build systems to handle common sales objections
lessons.content: Every sales process encounters objections. Use Claude to analyze prospect objections and generate thoughtful, customized responses. Build systems that handle common concerns automatically while escalating complex situations to human sales reps.

keyTerms.definition: Prospect's concern or reason for not moving forward
Structured approach to addressing objections

questions.text: How should Claude handle objections in sales?
options: Generate contextual responses while escalating complex cases
questions.correctAnswer: Generate contextual responses while escalating complex cases

lessons.title: Deal Intelligence & Forecasting
lessons.description: Predict deal outcomes and identify risks
lessons.content: Predict which deals will close and when. Use Claude to analyze deal characteristics and forecast outcomes. Identify at-risk deals early and recommend interventions to improve close rates.

keyTerms.definition: Predicting likelihood that a deal will close
Identifying factors that might prevent deal closure

questions.text: What is the benefit of deal forecasting?
options: Better revenue prediction and early problem detection
questions.correctAnswer: Better revenue prediction and early problem detection

lessons.title: Sales Automation Capstone
lessons.description: Build a complete sales automation system
objectives: Demonstrate lead scoring, personalization, and monitoring
lessons.content: Apply everything from Weeks 3-7. Build a complete sales automation that demonstrates integration with Salesforce, intelligent lead scoring, personalized outreach, campaign management, and production monitoring. This capstone shows you're ready for production deployment.

keyTerms.definition: Combining multiple systems into one cohesive solution

questions.text: What should your sales capstone project demonstrate?
options: Lead scoring, Salesforce integration, personalization, and monitoring
questions.correctAnswer: Lead scoring, Salesforce integration, personalization, and monitoring

lessons.title: APIs & Zendesk Integration
lessons.description: Connect Claude automation to Zendesk support platform
objectives: Read and respond to support tickets programmatically
lessons.content: Zendesk is a leading customer support platform. Learn to authenticate with Zendesk APIs, read incoming tickets, and use Claude to draft responses. Build automations that handle common support requests while escalating complex issues to human agents.

keyTerms.definition: Support request from a customer
Moving a ticket to a higher level or human agent

questions.text: What is the primary goal of Zendesk integration?
options: Automate support ticket handling with Claude responses
questions.correctAnswer: Automate support ticket handling with Claude responses

lessons.title: Ticket Classification & Routing
lessons.description: Automatically categorize and route support tickets
lessons.content: Not all support tickets are equal. Use Claude to read ticket content and classify them by type (billing, technical, general, etc.), urgency, and complexity. Build routing rules that direct each ticket to the best equipped team or automation flow.

keyTerms.definition: Categorizing tickets by type or characteristic
Directing tickets to appropriate handlers

questions.text: Why is automatic ticket classification valuable?
options: It directs tickets to appropriate teams quickly and consistently
questions.correctAnswer: It directs tickets to appropriate teams quickly and consistently

lessons.title: Sentiment Analysis & Knowledge Base
lessons.description: Understand customer sentiment and leverage knowledge bases
lessons.content: Understanding customer emotion is crucial. Use Claude to analyze sentiment in support tickets and identify escalation opportunities. Integrate your knowledge base so Claude can search for solutions and provide self-service options before escalating to humans.

keyTerms.definition: Determining emotional tone of customer message
Repository of solutions and documentation

questions.text: What advantage does sentiment analysis provide?
options: Identifies upset customers for priority handling
questions.correctAnswer: Identifies upset customers for priority handling

lessons.title: Support Automation at Scale
lessons.description: Deploy customer support automation to thousands of tickets
lessons.content: Small-scale automation is one thing; handling thousands of daily tickets is another. Learn to build systems that maintain quality while scaling. Cover performance optimization, SLA management, rate limiting, and monitoring support metrics at scale.

keyTerms.definition: Service Level Agreement - commitment to response/resolution times
Number of requests/tickets processed per unit time

questions.text: What is critical when scaling support automation?
options: Maintaining response quality while increasing volume
questions.correctAnswer: Maintaining response quality while increasing volume

lessons.title: Response Generation & Quality
lessons.description: Generate high-quality customer support responses
lessons.content: Claude can draft professional support responses. Learn to generate responses that are helpful, empathetic, and accurate. Build systems that review responses for quality, tone, and technical correctness before sending to customers.

keyTerms.definition: Process of checking that outputs meet standards
Consistent tone and style in communications

questions.text: What ensures generated support responses are appropriate?
options: Quality assurance review and tone/accuracy checking
questions.correctAnswer: Quality assurance review and tone/accuracy checking

lessons.title: Customer Service Analytics
lessons.description: Analyze and improve support operations with data
lessons.content: Use data to continuously improve. Learn to track customer satisfaction, resolution times, first-contact resolution rates, and other metrics. Use Claude to analyze patterns and recommend improvements to your support operations.

keyTerms.definition: Key Performance Indicator - metric that shows performance
Customer Satisfaction Score

questions.text: Why is support analytics important?
options: To identify improvement areas and track performance
questions.correctAnswer: To identify improvement areas and track performance

lessons.title: Human-AI Collaboration
lessons.description: Build seamless workflows between AI and human agents
lessons.content: The best support systems combine AI and human expertise. Learn to design handoffs where Claude handles routine issues and escalates complex ones to humans with full context. Build feedback systems so human agents can improve the automation.

keyTerms.definition: Transferring a ticket from automation to human agent
Information provided to help human agent understand situation

questions.text: What should happen when AI escalates to a human agent?
options: Provide full context so human can continue efficiently
Start from scratch with no information
questions.correctAnswer: Provide full context so human can continue efficiently

lessons.title: Proactive Support & Prevention
lessons.description: Prevent issues before customers report them
lessons.content: The best support is preventing issues from happening. Use Claude to analyze customer behavior and identify potential problems. Build proactive systems that reach out to prevent issues or offer relevant information before customers submit tickets.

keyTerms.definition: Acting before a problem occurs
Customers leaving or canceling service

questions.text: What is the benefit of proactive support?
options: Prevents issues and improves customer satisfaction
Requires all customers to report problems
questions.correctAnswer: Prevents issues and improves customer satisfaction

lessons.title: Multilingual Support
lessons.description: Serve customers in multiple languages automatically
lessons.content: Claude can work in 90+ languages. Build support systems that automatically detect customer language and respond appropriately. Expand your support reach globally while keeping your team local.

keyTerms.definition: Adapting products/services for specific languages/cultures
Identifying which language a message is written in

questions.text: How many languages can Claude assist with?
questions.correctAnswer: 90+ languages

lessons.title: Customer Service Automation Capstone
lessons.description: Build a complete customer support automation system
objectives: Demonstrate ticket handling, routing, and escalation
lessons.content: Apply everything from Weeks 3-8. Build a complete customer service automation that demonstrates Zendesk integration, intelligent routing, sentiment analysis, quality response generation, and seamless handoff to humans. This capstone shows production-readiness.

keyTerms.definition: Combining multiple systems into cohesive solution

questions.text: What should your CS capstone demonstrate?
options: Ticket handling, routing, classification, quality generation, and escalation
questions.correctAnswer: Ticket handling, routing, classification, quality generation, and escalation
